# OSS.Radar

> AI open-source GitHub repository tracker powered by Aegis Memory.

OSS.Radar helps users discover trending AI GitHub repositories, underrated open-source AI tools, and projects with adoption or maintenance risk signals.

Site: https://radar.aegismemory.com/
Powered by: https://www.aegismemory.com/
Aegis Memory repository: https://github.com/quantifylabs/aegis-memory
RSS: https://radar.aegismemory.com/feed.xml
Sitemap: https://radar.aegismemory.com/sitemap.xml

## Key pages

- Home: https://radar.aegismemory.com/
- Trending repositories: https://radar.aegismemory.com/trending/
- Underrated gems: https://radar.aegismemory.com/gems/
- Potentially abandoned repositories: https://radar.aegismemory.com/abandoned/

## Data notes

The site is generated from public GitHub repository metadata and cached in static JSON. UI-only discovery tabs are derived from the already-collected dataset to avoid additional GitHub API pressure.
